description_long: A tall stack of five fluffy pancakes sits neatly on a round white ceramic plate. The pancakes are dark brown with lighter edges, and each layer is separated by a thin, pale line, suggesting a soft, airy texture. Generously poured golden syrup cascades over the top, with some drips running down the sides, creating a glossy, appetizing appearance. A small, square pat of butter rests at the center of the top pancake, slightly melting into the syrup. The plate is simple and unadorned, providing a clean contrast to the rich colors of the pancakes and syrup. No additional garnishes or decorations are present, emphasizing the classic breakfast presentation.
description: A stack of five dark brown pancakes with golden syrup and a pat of butter sits on a plain white ceramic plate. Syrup drips down the sides, creating a classic, appetizing look.
description_view_0: The stack of pancakes is seen from the front, with syrup pooled on top and a pat of butter centered; no syrup drips are visible on this side.
description_view_1: This view shows syrup beginning to drip down the right side of the pancake stack, with the butter pat still visible on top.
description_view_2: Syrup is more prominent, dripping down the front and right side of the pancakes, with the butter pat clearly on top.
description_view_3: Multiple syrup drips are visible running down the front of the stack, emphasizing the glossy texture; the butter pat remains on top.
